title: Light Norwegian Sushi Rice
description: A rich and silky light Norwegian dish featuring sushi rice, inspired by traditional sushi but adapted with anti-inflammatory-friendly ingredients and served on a talavera plate.
instructions: Mix sushi vinegar and water together in a small saucepan and bring to a boil on medium heat.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes, or until the mixture has thickened slightly.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked Japanese short-grain rice and sushi vinegar mixture. Mix gently until the rice is well coated.
Transfer the rice to a 9x13 inch baking dish and let it cool to room temperature.
After the rice has cooled, transfer it to a large mixing bowl and gently mix in tandoor-cooked turmeric, ginger, and lemongrass spices.
Finally, shape the sushi rice into small oval shapes.
Cut the tops off of 2 talavera plates and use them as molds to shape the sushi rice into perfect oval shapes.
